subcodes.first_line: O leaves of the luminous Tree! In this dawning hour when the divine light streams forth from the heaven-sent dawn upon the hidden world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات سدره نورانیه درین صبحگاهی که نور الهی از فجر رحمانی عالم پنهان ساطع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
